data.body: Seam reference mapped (subagent). Key APIs: registry.{effective_criteria,effective_routing,load_criteria,by_id,CANONICAL_LLM,RegistryError} + orchestrator.route_criteria + det_floor.PlanContext + production_batch_runner._project_criteria + ProductionBatchRunner/FakeRunner/BatchRunRequest; prompt_library._invalidate_caches autouse; coach.{validate_move_registry,move_applies,applicable_moves,validate_subject,render_coach_notes,coach}; orchestrator.{load_move_registry,MOVE_REGISTRY}; evals.eval.{calibrate_criterion,load_eval_spec,validate_eval_spec,EvalError} metric keys recall/false_accept/agreement/kappa/stability_min. TDD calibration decision: leaf 3863 (real integration surface) gets held-out implementer subagent (given intent+ACs, NOT my test file; I validate with held-out integration+regression tests). Leaves 2ad8/21dd/f698 are declarative content whose literals are dictated verbatim by ACs -> RED-first + direct authoring + full-suite validation incl. existing regression tests they must not break (scale-ceremony judgment; anti-overfit value near-zero for pure transcription). 21dd also has an [operator-attested] live-LLM eval AC (24 calls, strict thresholds).
